title: CT7 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT7.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT7.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT7.Input S ctx} →
          CT7.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT7.Graph.NodeId.entry CT7.Graph.NodeId.realizationSearch

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT7.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT7.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT7.Input S ctx} →
          CT7.RealizationCertificate S capability ctx input →
            CT7.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT7.Graph.NodeId.realizationSearch
              CT7.Graph.NodeId.realizationTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT7.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT7.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT7.Input S ctx} →
          CT7.UnrealizedState S capability ctx input →
            CT7.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT7.Graph.NodeId.realizationSearch CT7.Graph.NodeId.distinctionSearch

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT7.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT7.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT7.Input S ctx} →
          CT7.DistinguishingResidual S capability ctx input →
            CT7.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT7.Graph.NodeId.distinctionSearch
              CT7.Graph.NodeId.distinguishingTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT7.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT7.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT7.Input S ctx} →
          CT7.NeutralityCertificate S capability ctx input →
            CT7.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT7.Graph.NodeId.distinctionSearch CT7.Graph.NodeId.neutralTerminal

semanticFields.leanType: S.response ctx input.left context ≠ S.response ctx input.right context

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of objects whose context behavior CT7 compares.
presentation.label: Compared object

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of finite contexts capable of distinguishing two objects.
presentation.label: Realization context

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that object o realizes the target behavior in context k.
presentation.label: Realization predicate

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT7.Spec P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Object → self.Context → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Spec.Realizes

presentation.plainExplanation: The Boolean response assigned to an object-context pair.
presentation.label: Declared response

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT7.Spec P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Object → self.Context → Bool
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Spec.response

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered context enumeration specialized to the branch and object pair.
presentation.label: Finite comparison contexts

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT7.Spec P} → CT7.Capability S → Core.BranchContext P → S.Object → S.Object → FinEnum S.Context
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Capability.contexts

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding the exact realization predicate.
presentation.label: Realization decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT7.Spec P} →
    CT7.Capability S →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) →
        (object : S.Object) → (context : S.Context) → Decidable (S.Realizes ctx object context)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Capability.realizesDecidable

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Graph.NodeId

apiDeclarations.type: CT7.Graph.NodeId → String
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Graph.NodeId.code

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT7.Spec P) →
    CT7.Capability S → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → CT7.Input S ctx → CT7.Graph.NodeId → CT7.Graph.NodeId → Type u_4
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Graph.Edge

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Graph.Terminal

apiDeclarations.type: CT7.Graph.Terminal → CT7.Graph.NodeId
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Graph.Terminal.nodeId

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT7.Spec P) →
    CT7.Capability S → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → CT7.Input S ctx → CT7.Graph.NodeId → CT7.Graph.NodeId → Type u_4
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT7.Spec P) → CT7.Capability S → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → CT7.Input S ctx → List CT7.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT7.Spec P → Type (max (max (max u_1 u_2) u_3) u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Capability

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT7.Spec P → Core.BranchContext P → Type u_3
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.Input

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT7.Spec P) → CT7.Capability S → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → CT7.Input S ctx → Type u_4
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT7.Spec P) → CT7.Capability S → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → CT7.Input S ctx → CT7.Graph.Terminal → Type u_4
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.RawOutcome

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT7.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT7.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → (input : CT7.Input S ctx) → CT7.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.run

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT7.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT7.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → (input : CT7.Input S ctx) → CT7.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT7.Spec P) (capability : CT7.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT7.Input S ctx), CT7.RawOutcome.Valid S capability ctx input (CT7.run S capability ctx input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT7.Spec P) (capability : CT7.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT7.Input S ctx),
  CT7.Graph.ValidTrace S capability ctx input
    (CT7.ExecutionResult.trace S capability ctx input (CT7.run S capability ctx input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT7.Spec P) (capability : CT7.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT7.Input S ctx),
  ∃ result,
    CT7.RawOutcome.Valid S capability ctx input result.outcome ∧
      CT7.Graph.ValidTrace S capability ctx input (CT7.ExecutionResult.trace S capability ctx input result)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT7.Spec P) (capability : CT7.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT7.Input S ctx) (left right : CT7.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input),
  left = CT7.run S capability ctx input → right = CT7.run S capability ctx input → left = right
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT7.Spec P) (capability : CT7.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT7.Input S ctx) (result : CT7.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input),
  result.terminal = CT7.Graph.Terminal.realization ∨
    result.terminal = CT7.Graph.Terminal.distinguishing ∨ result.terminal = CT7.Graph.Terminal.neutral
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT7.residualKindContracts
